task0.history:

task1.objective: Develop the CSS stylesheet defining typography, layout grid, header/nav styling, section containers, table styles for schedule, and map container styling.

task2.objective: Generate the Home page HTML content: include conference name (ICLR2025), dates, location, organizer info, and site navigation menu.

task3.objective: Generate the Schedule section HTML: create a multi-day table (April 27 – May 1, 2025) with placeholder session titles and times.
task3.history:

task5.objective: Assemble a .ppt slide deck: one slide per section (Home, Schedule, Venue), embedding the generated HTML snippets and linked CSS content into appropriately formatted slides.
